violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Small containers of sherbet stored on foor in walk in cooler.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Prep table cooler on cook line not maintaining proper temperatures. Service company notified. Awaiting service.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Upright single door freezer on cook line missing interior door panel. Exposed foam insulation. Needs repair.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Counter top and shelving has veneer peeling.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machine needs cleaning.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Upright freezers/coolers have food debris and syrup splatter residue. In need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. BOH cabinets and cook line shelving have grease build up and need cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Utensil storage containers in BOH prep area have food debris and need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have build up of debris under line equipment and shelving units in facility and need cleaning. Walls and ceiling near cooking equipment heavily discolored and are in need of cleaning. Ceiling and light fixture in walk in cooler has dust build up and needs cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer spray bottle not maintained at proper concentration. See table. Label spray bottle as to actual contents. Not currently labeled.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Chili (11/29) & Pork (11/18) containers in walk in cooler. Discard outdated food items.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Upright single door reach in freezer is missing interior door panel exposing foam insulation and has damaged handle patched with tape.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep table lower shelving units have build-up of debris and need cleaning. Area around fryers have build-up of grease and food debris and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling and walls near fryers discolored and have build-up and need cleaning. Floors need cleaning under line cooking and cooling equipment. Area around grease trap needs cleaning. Floor and walls near utility sink need cleaning.
